standard_variable.semantic_intent: microbiology antibiotic susceptibility leaf under an organism branch
standard_variable.semantic_grain: one row per microbiology susceptibility leaf row

database_mapping.source_grain: one opening-scope source microbiology antibiotic susceptibility row
database_mapping.target_grain: one retained antibiotic susceptibility leaf row

microbiology_family_build_translation.entity_grain_translation: retain one leaf row per source susceptibility microevent_id under an organism branch
microbiology_family_build_translation.source_hierarchy_translation: retain susceptibility rows as leaf children under organism branches and parent microbiology test events
microbiology_family_build_translation.parent_child_translation: link each susceptibility leaf to microbiology_organism_branch_id and microbiology_test_event_id
microbiology_family_build_translation.raw_text_retention_translation: retain raw antibiotic name, interpretation code, dilution text/comparison/value, and comments together with standardized interpretation helper classes
microbiology_family_build_translation.no_row_translation: absence of a retained susceptibility leaf means no approved susceptibility row under this mapping, not absence of resistance or antibiotic exposure

validation_contract.no_row_policy_check: absence of row is not proof of susceptibility, resistance, organism absence, culture absence, or antibiotic exposure absence
notes: Rare raw interpretation codes are retained and folded into explicit standardized helper classes.

execution_contract.formal_output_rule: The governed execution.py entrypoint should read this mapping spec and delegate to the current local reviewed implementation.
execution_contract.non_bypassable_target_rule: Formal std_microbiology_antibiotic_susceptibility outputs for MIMIC-IV-3.1 should be produced only through the governed execution.py path.
